params.StackDescription: REP Choose target battle_{p:You} chooses {c:Targeted} & remove_{p:You} removes & put_{p:You} puts & . Activate only as a sorcery._.
params.SpellDescription: Choose target battle. If an opponent protects it, remove a defense counter from it. Otherwise, put a defense counter on it. Activate only as a sorcery.
